subdomains.title: Applying Knowledge of Content and Pedagogy

parameters.name: Content Knowledge
parameters.lookFors: Content presented is accurate; Connections to real-world contexts are included; Links to other disciplines are visible.

parameters.name: Relevant Usage of Tools
parameters.description: Appropriate tools are selected to support teaching and learning
parameters.lookFors: Reference to use of tools in the plan: Culture tools to build classroom culture; Instructional tools to engage students in learning.

parameters.name: Differentiated Plan
parameters.description: Planning accounts for diverse student needs and readiness levels
parameters.lookFors: Support or scaffolds are planned for learners who need them; Extensions are planned for advanced learners.

parameters.name: Clarity of Outcomes
parameters.description: Outcomes are clear, written in student-friendly language
parameters.lookFors: Outcomes represent high expectations; Outcomes are measurable and observable.

parameters.name: Selection of Resources
parameters.description: Resources are aligned with instructional outcomes
parameters.lookFors: Resources are appropriate for student ages and backgrounds; Digital resources are integrated effectively.

parameters.name: Learning Activities
parameters.description: Activities are highly relevant and engaging
parameters.lookFors: Activities follow a logical sequence; Students have choices in how they learn.

subdomains.title: Creating an Environment of Respect and Rapport

parameters.name: Teacher Interaction
parameters.description: Interactions are friendly and demonstrate caring
parameters.lookFors: Teacher responds to student interests; Humor is used appropriately; Body language is positive.

parameters.name: Importance of Content
parameters.description: Teacher conveys enthusiasm for the subject
parameters.lookFors: Teacher demonstrates that the work is important; Students are proud of their work.

parameters.name: Clarity of Purpose
parameters.description: Purpose of the lesson is clearly communicated
parameters.lookFors: Teacher explains the 'why' behind activities; Instructions are clear and step-by-step.

parameters.name: Accuracy of Reflection
parameters.description: Teacher makes accurate assessment of lesson effectiveness
parameters.lookFors: Teacher identifies specific evidence of student learning; Teacher suggests ways to improve the lesson.

parameters.name: Collaboration with Colleagues
parameters.description: Participates actively in professional learning communities
parameters.lookFors: Teacher shares resources with others; Teacher contributes to school-wide initiatives.
